title: Struct initialisation with data type and member name is not supported in 3.916

features.name: struct literal with data type and default value
features.description: Code should include a struct literal initialization using data type names as field initializers, where each field is specified as data_type:default_value
features.snippet:
struct {int a; shortreal b;} ab;
initial ab = ab'{int:1, shortreal:1.0};

features.name: struct literal with default keyword
features.description: Code should include a struct literal initialization using the 'default' keyword to set all fields to a single default value
features.snippet:
struct {int a; int b;} c;
initial c = '{default:0};
